subcodes.first_line: I beseech God that He may at all times envelop him, Mashhadi Abu'l-Qasim Abavi, with the fragrant breaths of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب مشهدی ابوالقاسم ابوی از حق میجوایم که ایشانرا در جمیع احیان بنفحه عنایتش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
